name: 22 Minute Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and sugar in a large bowl.
2. In a saucepan, combine the water, margarine, shortening, and cocoa. Bring to a boil.
3. Pour the boiling mixture over the flour and sugar mixture.
4. Add the buttermilk, eggs, baking soda, and vanilla extract.
5. Grease an 11 x 17 inch (jelly roll) pan.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 18 to 20 minutes.
7. In a separate saucepan, melt the margarine over low heat.
8. Add the sweet milk and cocoa powder until all ingredients are well combined.
9. Once melted, add the powdered sugar, chopped nuts, and vanilla extract.
10. Pour the mixture immediately over the cake as it comes out of the oven.
